title: Ward 1908 - Intake Ledger Concordance Puzzle Board

Puzzle visual for "Intake Ledger Concordance". Objective: Align patient IDs split across channels to reconstruct missing admissions.. Build layered clue board where each shard can be solved collaboratively.
